parameters.name: preop
parameters.label: Channel Pre OP
parameters.description: A menu of unary operations that are performed on each channel as it comes in to the Math include:

parameters.name: chanop
parameters.label: Combine Channels
parameters.description: A choice of operations is performed between the channels of the input . Input and output channels are selected by the 'Combine Channels Input' and 'Combine Channels Output' parameters below. The Nth p

parameters.name: postop
parameters.label: Channel Post OP
parameters.description: A menu (same as Channel Pre ) is performed as the finale stage upon the channels resulting from the above operations.

parameters.name: integer
parameters.label: Integer
parameters.description: The resulting values can be converted to integers.

parameters.name: inputmask
parameters.label: Combine Channels Input
parameters.description: Select which channels are included in the input.

parameters.name: outputchannels
parameters.label: Combine Channels Output
parameters.description: Select which channels are included in the output result.

parameters.name: preoff
parameters.label: Pre-Add
parameters.description: First, add this value to each pixel of each channel.

parameters.name: gain
parameters.label: Multiply
parameters.description: Then multiply by this value.

parameters.name: postoff
parameters.label: Post-Add
parameters.description: Then add this value.

parameters.name: op
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: The math operation performed.

parameters.name: fromrange2
